prompt: A possessed marionette-like ranged caster mob enemy for a dark-fantasy defense RPG, jerky unnatural limb angles bent at wrong joints, thin puppet-like frame with loose dangling string-like tethers, glowing projectile orbs orbiting its outstretched hands, tilted head suggesting broken puppet control, simple menacing-but-generic low-tier mob design with minimal ornamentation and a small readable silhouette, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, sickly green-violet menace lighting from the orbiting orbs, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
